UI strip: two-tier explainer callout in YourBillCard (£2,068 = totalBill - thisCouncilBandD derivation).

phase_3_5_tier1_drift.note: Population fix 64,200 → 64,889 in src/data/population.ts (verbatim ONS Mid-2024). All other Tier-1 values (council_tax_requirement, council_tax_base, reserves, capital_programme, total_band_d, total_councillors) reconciled to source-manifest.json sha256s.

LEADER: stripped → Cllr Jeremy Gardner (per democracy.adur-worthing.gov.uk Cmt 138 via Wayback; Labour took control 23 May 2024). phase_4_populate_field_sources.note: 12 field_sources entries written with NORTH-STAR §4 schema (tier + extraction_method + sha256_at_access OR archive_exempt + page + excerpt + page_image_url where applicable).

phase_5_structural_validators.result: 0 errors for Adur. 5 pre-existing soft warnings (4 RA Part 1 budget-line drift at edge of 10% tolerance, 1 precept-sum vs total_band_d structural difference for parishes).
